x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Alert correlation rules are prerequisite for Now Assist TSOM AI-assisted event grouping. Low rule count means Now Assist has no correlation logic to enhance.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("em_alert_correlation_rule");gr.addQuery("active",true);gr.query();var n=gr.getRowCount();return{status:n>=5?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" active alert correlation rules",finding:n<5?"Only "+n+" correlation rules. Now Assist TSOM AI grouping requires correlation rules as the foundation.":n+" active correlation rules -- Now Assist has the foundation for AI-assisted event grouping."};})()
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure alert correlation rules via em_alert_correlation_rule_list.do for each key monitoring source.
